chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1307 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgency application(s) 18.12.2025 Ms. Rehana Siddique, advocate for petitioner *** Urgency is granted. Learned counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE
